name: growright
description: GrowRight – Child development tracking and school syllabus comparison platform
author: Sourojit D <soft.jd4u@gmail.com>

scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd server && npx prisma db seed
scripts.lint: cd server && npm run lint && cd ../client && npm run lint
scripts.clean: rm -rf server/dist client/dist node_modules server/node_modules client/node_modules
